description.value: Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Used for rolling to hit when fighting in ranged or melee combat, in place of any other skills. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling checks involving feats of physicality, including athletics and evasion. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling when making checks that require training or finesse. Note: if the task is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers accordingly. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
When fired, the weapon producees a chorus of bright, multicolored muzzle flashes and squeaks.
Cyberware weapon. You must have the appropriate cyberware installed.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
Thermite rounds bury themselves into a target and briefly ignite. Add +1 damage to the attack. If a 1 is rolled while firing, the weapon jams.
Light version of an Armorjack. No armor penalty.
Light version of an Armorjack for your head. No armor penalty.

ReTox is produced by the Bozo Circus of Merriment. It takes the form of tablets that look similar to jelly beans or other candy, and overpowers the user’s mouth with flavor (usually fruit or cinnamon) when bit into. The drug is impossibly addictive, to the point that even partygangs will hesitate to take it despite its potent effects. ReTox becomes one of the only things that an addict is able to taste, after heavy usage.

Primary Effect

  • Dose lasts 20 minutes.

  • For the duration of the primary effect, the user gains crit successes on 9s, and crit fails on 2s.

  • For the duration of the primary effect, you veer between an induced state of euphoria and heightened sensory input (rolls of 6+), and severe depression (rolls of 1-5), and struggle to register minor sensations. Do your best to roleplay accordingly.

Secondary Effect (DV17 - raised to 18, the first time ReTox is ingested)

  • If the user wasn’t already addicted to ReTox, they are now. While addicted, they crit fail on 2s and 3s, unless the user is currently experiencing the primary effect of ReTox (fails on 2s remain, fails on 3s are temporarily removed).

  • While addicted to ReTox, you will have trouble feeling any physical sensations but the most severe, your sense of taste, touch, and smell will be greatly diminished, and you’ll periodically experience severe depressive episodes unless under the effects of the drug. It isn’t the drug itself that you crave, but that feeling of sensation. Do your best to roleplay accordingly.
An Exotic Very Heavy Pistol. Requires ear protection to prevent Damaged Ear critical injuries. The target must beat a DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs Check or suffer the Damaged Ear critical injury.
A rechargeable (1 hour) battery pack, commonly used with Exotic weapons. Contains 8 shots and can be recharged.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 3/Rank-And-File - Low-level but accredited members of NC's various groups, with enough authority to wear the org's colors but not enough to pose a real threat on their own.

Gang-Wide Ability - Circus Freaks: Bozos have the uncanny ability to sus out people’s deepest fears courtesy of aftermarket interrogation soft, be it for the addictive thrill-seeking of merrymakers, or the twisted torture of the joyboys. When a Bozo enters a scene, every non-Bozo character must make a Willpower Save (roll 1d10 - a result less or equal to the player’s Willpower stat passes; use 1/2 lowdown for NPCs). On a failure, that character immediately loses a facedown check against every Bozo in the scene. This penalty is only removed once all Bozos are killed, rendered unconscious, or removed from a scene.

Additionally, most Bozos will enter combat under the influence of ReTox, the gang’s drug of choice. See the item description for more information.

Ability - Memetic Hazard: When within 6m/yds of a fool, if a character failed their willpower save for Circus Freaks, they suffer the effects of ReTox until leaving the fool’s effect radius. They do not need to make an addiction check when leaving the radius, and the effect does not count towards the check penalty for a potential first use, later.

Extra Gear - Choose between a Bozo Noisemaker SMG and 60 armor-piercing rounds (when fired, the gun produces a chorus of bright, multicolored muzzle flashes and squeaks), a Bozo confetti cannon shotgun and 8 incendiary shells (when fired, the pellets are ejected in a cloud of confetti), or 2 Bozo medium pistols which can be dual-wielded and 48 firecracker thermite rounds (explode into multicolored sparks when fired).

  • •For every 3 bozos in a scene, one fool is equipped with a Bozo Shrieker (it’s a clown laugh, of course), in addition to any other equipment.

Bah, kids today and their thrill-seeking. Back when I was young, my idea of a good time was a night out with the boys, a joytoy and a dozen cans of smash. If a fool’s on the scene, be careful not to get too close – there’s something strange about the way they move, and you’ll find yourself imitating them without even meaning to.
